zh-CN: 知识库：支持按内容搜索笔记；从外部拖文件进知识库更稳定
AI：可把网页链接交给助手阅读；长文件会先整理摘要再进对话，更省上下文；修复部分新款模型连不上或检测失败的问题
SSH：支持端口隧道转发；复用连接、唤醒已有标签等选项让反复登录更少折腾
终端：长日志滚动时显示更稳、不易乱行；断线后自动回到终端输入区；可选显示关闭按钮，鼠标中键可关闭当前标签
主机列表：堡垒机主机分组更清晰，列表打开更快、布局更好认
en-US: Knowledge base: search your notes by meaning; dragging files in from outside is more reliable
AI: share a web link and the assistant can read it; long files are summarized so they use less context; fixes model connection checks for some newer models
SSH: port tunnel forwarding; options to reuse connections and wake an existing tab mean fewer repeated logins
Terminal: steadier display when scrolling long logs; after a disconnect, focus returns to the terminal; optional tab close button and middle-click to close the current tab
Host list: clearer grouping for bastion hosts, faster loading, and easier-to-scan layout

zh-CN: Kubernetes：新增 Kubernetes 插件，并适配 AI 对话的 Command/Agent 模式
SSH：新增断线后的自动重连；实现唤醒连接处理与命令执行
AI：新增 GLM 兼容消息格式转换；修复 AI 设置中“Enable Thinking”按钮显示/可用性问题
Skill：支持将 Skill 以 ZIP 形式导出进行分享
终端与命令执行：平台改用登录 Shell 获取用户配置；优化 autoExecuteCode 自动切换终端的执行逻辑
本地连接：支持本地连接的（Ctrl/Command + K）快捷键弹出的对话框进行AI对话
文件管理：修复断线后文件管理导致无法重新连接的问题
任务管理：更新任务标题时同步写入 updated_at 时间戳
en-US: Kubernetes: add Kubernetes plugin; adapt the AI dialog Command/Agent modes and improve K8s terminal background theme handling
SSH: add automatic reconnection after disconnects; implement wakeup connection handling with command execution
AI: add GLM-compatible message format conversion; fix the "Enable Thinking" button in AI settings
Skill: support exporting Skill as a ZIP for sharing
Terminal & command execution: use login shells on Unix-like platforms to load user configuration; improve autoExecuteCode switching logic for terminal execution
Local connection: support AI dialog in the dialog opened by the shortcut key (Ctrl/Command + K) for local connection
File management: fix the inability to reconnect after file management when disconnected
Task management: update the updated_at timestamp when the task title changes

zh-CN: 技能（Skill）：对话中会显示当前用到的Skill；支持把一段对话一键整理成Skill；启用Skill时会有提示；管理、编辑Skill内容更简单
知识库与同步：笔记可同步到云端并查看剩余空间；打开应用后会自动拉取最新内容；用户配置支持跨设备同步
资产管理：优化添加主机的布局样式
界面与体验：首次打开默认使用深色主题；填写主机地址与端口时排版更整齐
en-US: Skill: see which Skill apply to the current chat; turn a conversation into a Skill with one click; get a notice when a Skill is turned on; simpler management and editing of Skill content
Knowledge base and sync: sync notes to the cloud and see how much space is left; the app pulls the latest content when you open it; user configuration supports cross-device synchronization
Asset management: optimize the layout style of adding hosts
Look and feel: dark theme by default; tidier layout for host and port fields

zh-CN: 多语言：新增阿拉伯语本地化支持
Agent：新增 read_file 工具与大体积工具输出落盘策略，规范 tool_result JSON 解析，提升复杂任务稳定性
AI 对话：支持仅输入 / 触发命令弹窗，降低命令触发门槛
Skills：修复无法读取本地 Skills 目录下 references、scripts 子目录的问题
文件管理：重构文件夹上传/下载/传输流程，统一父子任务与进度展示，修复标签切换导致已选文件丢失的问题
性能与体验：优化终端数据处理与交互稳定性，修复浅色主题切换背景时的终端显示异常
en-US: Localization: add Arabic localization support
Agent: add read_file tool and large tool-output offloading, normalize tool_result JSON handling to improve stability for complex tasks
AI conversation: support triggering the command popup by typing a standalone /, lowering the friction of command usage
Skills: fix the issue where the references and scripts subdirectories under the local Skills directory were not read correctly
File management: refactor folder upload/download/transfer flow, unify parent/child task and progress display, fix selected files being lost when switching tabs
Performance and UX: optimize terminal data handling and interaction stability, fix terminal display issues when switching backgrounds in the light theme

zh-CN: AI 与 Agent：删除 Chat 模式、Agent 模式支持空主机和批量的主机
命令补全：新增AI驱动的命令建议、支持长命令水平滚动不换行
终端：支持 Ctrl + 点击 快捷下载文件
知识库：Markdown 预览支持复制、下拉 transition 动画优化
界面与背景：优化自定义背景显示效果
文件管理：交互与拖拽优化、下拉选活跃 SFTP/拖拽新增、直接创建 SFTP
连接与其它：优化Jumpserver认证逻辑，支持仅密码连接
en-US: AI and Agent: remove Chat mode, Agent mode supports empty host and batch hosts
Command completion: add AI-driven command suggestions, support long command horizontal scroll no wrap
Terminal: support Ctrl+click to download files
Knowledge center: markdown preview supports copy, dropdown transition animation optimization
UI and background: optimize custom background display effect
File management: interaction and drag mode, dropdown active SFTP/drag to add
Connection and other: optimize Jumpserver authentication logic, support password connection only

zh-CN: 知识中心：Mermaid 渲染、Markdown 引导、重命名与标签同步修复
编辑器：统一配置管理、Monaco 行号与边距优化
文件管理：传输进度展示重构与测试修复
终端：Ctrl+R 防误触保留反向搜索、发送优先中断、输出渲染改进
标签与上下文：标签关闭逻辑优化、缓存对话数据修复
界面：背景图显示优化、水印展示逻辑调整
en-US: Knowledge center: Mermaid rendering, markdown guide, rename and tab sync fixes
Editor: unified config, Monaco line numbers and margin tweaks
File management: transfer progress refactor and test fixes
Terminal: Ctrl+R no accidental reload, send prioritizes interrupt, output rendering
Tabs and context: tab closure logic, cached chat data fix
UI: background image display optimization, watermark display logic adjustment

zh-CN: 新增知识库：支持图片与剪贴板粘贴、缩放与可配置字体、本地文件管理与拖拽、对话总结到知识库
工作区与快捷命令：工作区 IP/主机名显示切换、默认布局记忆、支持快捷命令拖拽排序与移动
终端与 AiTab：支持交互式命令执行，AiTab 动态背景与 Monaco 自定义背景，修复分屏误插入等问题
文件管理：文件管理与 SFTP 增强，修复插件拖拽与根目录等问题
体验优化：登录欢迎语与模型选项刷新、禁用误触刷新快捷键、macOS 全屏黑屏修复、依赖与 Electron 升级
en-US: Knowledge base: image and clipboard paste, zoom and configurable fonts, local file management and drag-and-drop, summarize conversations to knowledge base
Workspace and shortcut commands: Show IP/Hostname toggle in workspace, default layout memory, shortcut commands drag reorder and move
Terminal and AiTab: interactive command execution, AiTab dynamic background and Monaco custom background, fix split-tab accidental insertion and related issues
File management: file management and SFTP enhancements, fix plugin drag-and-drop and root directory issues
UX improvements: login welcome message and model options refresh, disable accidental reload shortcut, macOS fullscreen black screen fix, dependency and Electron upgrades

zh-CN: 新增任务管理 Focus Chain Service 和增强 Todo 功能，支持上下文跟踪、自动转换、日期字段和进度指示器
新增图片上传和可信设备管理功能
支持会话级别的只读命令自动批准和执行
本地 Windows 终端支持 AI 对话功能
新增订阅功能插件
AI Tab 增强：支持快速选择已打开主机、标签页上下文菜单、拖放上下文项，知识中心新增文档添加到聊天功能
支持在上下文中使用 @docs/chats 引用，插件按用户隔离提升安全性
增强 Linux 终端提示匹配，支持环境前缀和 shell 版本提示
优化主题样式和 UI 一致性，修复 Windows 系统快捷键和 SSH 类型兼容性问题
en-US: Add Focus Chain Service for task management and enhance Todo functionality with context tracking, auto-transition, date fields, and progress indicators
Add image upload and trusted device management features
Support session-level auto-approval and execution for read-only commands
Local Windows terminals support AI conversation
Add Subscribe feature plugin
AI Tab enhancements: quick selection for opened hosts, tab context menu, drag-and-drop context items, and knowledge center 'Add to Chat' feature
Support @docs/chats references in context and isolate plugins per user for improved security
Enhance Linux terminal prompt matching with environment prefixes and shell version prompts
Optimize theme styles and UI consistency, fix Windows system shortcuts and SSH type compatibility issues

zh-CN: 新增AWS EC2实例连接插件支持
新增堡垒机（Qizhi、UCloud）插件支持
新增个人知识库模块
支持Agent Skills
支持修改用户头像功能
国际版支持Apple ID登陆
新增多语言支持：德语、法语、意大利语、葡萄牙语、俄语、繁体中文
修复若干问题，提升用户体验
en-US: Add AWS EC2 instance connection plugin support
Add Bastion Host (Qizhi, UCloud) plugin support
Add personal knowledge base module
Support Agent Skills
Support modifying user avatars
International edition supports Apple ID login
Add multiple new languages: German, French, Italian, Portuguese, Russian, and Traditional Chinese
Fix several issues and improve user experience

zh-CN: 统一左侧栏点击的操作风格
支持交换机网络设备连接
数据同步设置默认启用状态
优化主机管理页面和密钥管理页面
SSH连接新增ProxyCommand参数支持
新增通用插件显示和编辑页面功能
优化主题和AiTab样式
优化若干问题，提升操作体验
en-US: Unify the operation style of the left sidebar click
Support switch network device connections
Set dataSync enabled by default status
Optimize host management page and key management page
Add ProxyCommand parameter support for SSH connections
Add generic plugin display and editing page functionality
Optimize theme and AiTab styles
Optimize several issues and enhance the operational experience

zh-CN: 区分中国版(chaterm.cn)/全球版(chaterm.ai)
中国版新增手机号验证码登录功能
新增关键词高亮功能
新增AiTab编辑模式功能
支持使用当前聊天输入创建新标签页
新增日语和韩语国际化支持
堡垒机连接提示多语言支持
AI Tab新增欢迎提示功能
优化模型配置加载状态显示
命令片段支持宏录制功能
内联命令生成支持模型选择
SFTP上传下载功能重构和优化
en-US: Support Chinese edition(chaterm.cn)/Global edition(chaterm.ai)
Add mobile phone verification code login for Chinese edition
Add keyword highlighting feature
Add AiTab edit mode feature
Support creating new tab using current chat input
Add Japanese and Korean internationalization support
Bastion connection prompt multi-language support
Add welcome tips for AI tab
Optimize model configuration loading state display
Command snippet supports macro recording
Provide model selection in inline command generation
SFTP upload download refactoring and optimization

zh-CN: 支持用户跳过登陆配置模型使用AI能力
终端中rz/sz命令支持
支持Shift+Tab快捷键切换AI对话模式
新增Maple Mono字体支持
命令输出结果OUTPUT区域新增主机IP显示标记
修复Vim可视化编辑器显示不全问题
优化AiTab页面缩放和多Tab切换体验
自定义背景内容国际化支持
优化若干问题，提升应用稳定性
en-US: Support user skip login to configure model to use AI ability
Support rz/sz commands in terminal
Support Shift+Tab shortcut key to switch AI conversation mode
Add Maple Mono font support
Add host IP display mark in the OUTPUT area of the command output results
Fix the problem of Vim visual editor display not fully problem
Optimize the AiTab page zoom and multi-Tab switching experience
Custom background content internationalization support
Optimize some issues and improve the application stability

zh-CN: 修复上传自定义的背景图片失败问题
堡垒机资产列表获取不全问题修复
AI对话多tab保存和显示对应的对话模式和AI模型
降低终端输入延迟
支持Command+Shift+P快捷键进行主机搜索
优化本地连接分屏功能
en-US: Fix the problem of uploading custom background images failed
Fix the problem of getting all the assets in the jump server list
AI conversation multi-tab save and display the corresponding conversation mode and AI model
Reduce the terminal input delay
Support Command+Shift+P shortcut key to search for hosts
Optimize the localhost split-screen feature

zh-CN: 支持自定义的背景图片和系统默认背景
重构终端分屏功能
重构快捷命令功能
新增版本功能更新提示
设置中新增终端触摸板缩放功能
支持对AI对话的中断操作
支持对AI对话的任务内容导出分享
支持XShell，SecureCRT导出的文件数据导入
Terminal和Agents布局切换相关功能优化
优化若干问题，提升应用稳定性
en-US: Support custom background images and system default background
Refactor the split-screen feature
Refactor the shortcut command feature
Add a new version update reminder feature
Add a new terminal touchpad zoom feature in the settings
Support interrupt the AI conversation
Support export the AI conversation task content and share
Support XShell, SecureCRT exported file data import
Optimize the Terminal and Agents layout switching related features
Optimize some issues and improve the application stability

zh-CN: 加强AI模型的选择和测试中的调试过程
在选项卡菜单中增加了内部分屏显示的选项
en-US: Enhance AI model selection and debugging process in tests
Added the option for inner split-screen display within the tab menu

zh-CN: 支持jms令牌
添加了SSH连接身份
en-US: Support jms token
Added SSH connection identity
